MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause Hearing is reset to Jan-23-2024 at 10:30am in Dept 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Continued To Sep-27-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ALLIANT CREDIT UNION's Application For Writ Of Possession.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "application for pre-trial writ of possession" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
